parameters.query:
INSERT INTO project_files (
  project_id,
  file_type,
  file_name,
  mime_type,
  storage_bucket,
  storage_path
) VALUES (
  '{{ $('Build HTML').all()[0].json.project_id }}'::uuid,
  'MONTEUR_AUFTRAG',
  '{{ $('Build HTML').all()[0].json.filename }}',
  'application/pdf',
  'project-files',
  '{{ $json.Key }}'  -- <-- HIER: aus Supabase Upload Response
)
ON CONFLICT (project_id, file_type, file_name) DO UPDATE SET
  storage_path = EXCLUDED.storage_path,
  created_at = now()
RETURNING id, storage_path;
